questionHtml:
What is the relative atomic mass of an element with the following mass spectrum?

A.  23

B.  24

C.  25

D.  28

meta.title: What is the relative atomic mass of an element with the following mass spectrum? A. 23 B. 24 C. 25 D. 28
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 1. Models of the particulate nature of matter

Structure 1.2.3—Mass spectra. Mass spectra are used to determine the relative atomic masses of elements from their isotopic composition. Interpret mass spectra in terms of identity and relative abundance of isotopes.
